text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation as I enter this space. The environment is clean, modern, and clearly dedicated to creativity and innovation. The glowing "R+D" on the wall promises an experience of discovery. As I step closer to the exhibit, I feel drawn into a realm where invention and contemplation merge—where human ingenuity is not only displayed, but actively invited. There is an atmosphere of industrious energy and purposeful activity, and I feel almost like a child at the threshold of something wondrous, eager to see what might unfold next.
